_comment: Copy to aws-config.json and fill in real values. NEVER commit the real file.
_iam_policy_reference: aws/iam-policy-jobs-write.json — attach to the IAM user whose keys are used here.
_endpoint_secret_note: The caller (coworker's server at assignments.revotext.com) must send this string as 'Authorization: Bearer <secret>' on every request. Rotate every 90 days; share out-of-band (phone, not email).
